name: detect
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.code === null || typeof output.result.code === 'string'

input.text: el gato esta en la casa y no quiere salir
the quick brown fox is jumping over the lazy dog

_note: translation.detect identifies the source language. It runs a REAL deterministic offline detector (Unicode-script + function-word heuristics) so a known string returns a grounded { language, code, confidence in [0,1], method } with NO network/LLM. Empty/whitespace text → ok:false 'text required'. An available LLM only refines the offline baseline (method:'llm'); an LLM failure falls back to the offline verdict and never errors.
